name: Dissolving Bath Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sweet almond oil and fragrance oil concentrate in a bowl.
2. In a separate container, mix the gum arabic and distilled water until well combined.
3. Slowly pour the oil mixture into the water mixture while stirring continuously to ensure proper emulsification.
4. The gum arabic helps blend the oil and water so they don't separate when used in the tub.
